source.description: Six-panel generated raster marker contact sheet reviewed before cropping; final panel saved as the finished master.
source.notes: Contact-sheet-first workflow, no labels, numbers, arrows, or embedded text.

process_strategy: The pencil stays diagonal with the same curled shavings while every shape, band, fill color, and shadow is established before the final cleanup.

final_elements.name: diagonal pencil guide and curled shaving guides
final_elements.description: A long diagonal guide for the pencil with loose curl guides beside the point.

final_elements.name: pencil body, point cone, eraser, and shaving silhouettes
final_elements.description: A chunky pencil with a pointed wood cone, eraser end, and curled shavings.

final_elements.name: ferrule bands, graphite point, and shaving curl interiors
final_elements.description: Metal ferrule bands, a dark pencil point, and inner curl lines on the shavings.

final_elements.name: side stripe, wood grain, eraser edge, and bold outline
final_elements.description: A side stripe on the pencil, grain marks in the wood, eraser edge, and thicker marker contour.

final_elements.name: yellow pencil fill, pink eraser fill, tan shavings, silver ferrule, and shadow
final_elements.description: Marker color applied to the already drawn pencil, eraser, shavings, ferrule, and base shadow.

frames.visible_job: Places the diagonal pencil guide and the curled shaving guides.
introduces: diagonal pencil guide and curled shaving guides

frames.visible_job: Builds the pencil body, point cone, eraser end, and shaving silhouettes.
introduces: pencil body, point cone, eraser, and shaving silhouettes
requires_prior_elements: diagonal pencil guide and curled shaving guides

frames.visible_job: Adds ferrule bands, the graphite point, and inner curl lines on the shavings.
introduces: ferrule bands, graphite point, and shaving curl interiors
requires_prior_elements: pencil body, point cone, eraser, and shaving silhouettes

frames.visible_job: Adds a side stripe, wood grain, eraser edge, and stronger marker outline.
introduces: side stripe, wood grain, eraser edge, and bold outline
requires_prior_elements: pencil body, point cone, eraser, and shaving silhouettes
ferrule bands, graphite point, and shaving curl interiors

frames.visible_job: Adds yellow, pink, tan, and silver marker fills plus a soft shadow to existing shapes.
introduces: yellow pencil fill, pink eraser fill, tan shavings, silver ferrule, and shadow
requires_prior_elements: pencil body, point cone, eraser, and shaving silhouettes
ferrule bands, graphite point, and shaving curl interiors
side stripe, wood grain, eraser edge, and bold outline

final_step.visible_job: Thickens existing outlines and deepens the existing pencil, eraser, shavings, ferrule, grain, and shadow.
allowed_changes: deeper yellow, pink, tan, and silver marker passes
clarification of existing point, ferrule, stripe, grain, shavings, highlight gaps, and shadow

rejection_checks: No major contour, prop, marking, or color choice should first appear in the final image.
No frame may darken, ink, color, shade, or clean a feature that was not already visible in an earlier frame.
No adjacent frame should look unchanged at card size.
The final image must keep the same pose, scale, and placement as the step frames.
